title: ferrotorch-cubecl conformance suite: GPU ops require backend active in CI for live execution
description: The conformance suite for ferrotorch-cubecl (ferrotorch-cubecl/tests/conformance_cubecl.rs) was built and all structural tests pass. GPU op tests (portable_add, portable_sub, portable_mul, portable_div, portable_relu, portable_neg, portable_abs, portable_exp, portable_ln, portable_sqrt, portable_sin, portable_cos, portable_tanh, portable_sigmoid, portable_matmul, all 8 polynomial families) cascade-skip with reason 'cubecl backend not active in test environment' because no WGPU/CUDA/ROCm adapter is available in the current test runner. These tests will execute and may surface divergences when run in a GPU-enabled CI environment. Reference rev: f1cd5d540e7531ccbd21f83cd6c70e8705409017. Suite: 62 conformance tests + 1 surface gate.
